overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character running through a rural Japanese village in spring. The character passes traditional thatched-roof farmhouses, stone walls, and blooming cherry blossom trees under a clear blue sky with a distant snow-capped mountain visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path approaching traditional farmhouse

agents.ego_description: samurai character running along dirt path toward a traditional thatched-roof farmhouse

entered.detail: traditional Japanese farmhouse with dark wooden walls and layered thatched roof
low stone wall running alongside the path made of irregular gray stones
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the stone wall
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai character running along a dirt path toward a traditional thatched-roof farmhouse. A stone wall and wooden barrels line the left side while a simple wooden fence borders the right, with tall grass and clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cherry blossom lined village path with mountain views

events.description: path opens into area lined with blooming white cherry blossom trees, revealing a snow-capped mountain in the distance

agents.ego_description: running through the cherry blossom grove with trees lining both sides of the path

entered.detail: numerous cherry trees in full white bloom creating a canopy effect over the path
distant mountain peak with snow visible against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open area densely lined with blooming cherry blossom trees. The path continues straight with the stone wall now visible only in the far distance on the left, while a majestic snow-capped mountain appears in the background on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with irrigation channel and scattered farmhouses

events.description: irrigation channel becomes visible running alongside the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: running along the village path passing multiple farmhouses with irrigation channel on the right

entered.detail: narrow water-filled irrigation ditch running parallel to the path with wooden edging
small wooden footbridge visible in the distance crossing the irrigation channel

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the village with an irrigation channel now running along the right side. Additional thatched farmhouses appear scattered throughout the landscape, and a wooden bridge becomes visible in the distance as the cherry blossoms give way to more open village scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: village junction with stone walls and pine forest

events.description: path widens approaching a junction with prominent stone wall on the right and pine forest ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the village junction, passing stone walls on the right with dense pine forest visible ahead

entered.detail: tall stone wall made of white-gray stones running along the right side of the path
dense forest of tall pine trees forming a dark green backdrop

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider junction area with a prominent stone wall on the right and a dense pine forest ahead. The wooden bridge approaches closer as the character continues running through the rural village setting, with scattered farmhouses still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural Japanese village that transforms from a narrow residential path into a wide, open landscape. It begins with a samurai running along a dirt path flanked by a stone wall and wooden barrels toward a traditional thatched-roof farmhouse. As the path straightens, the scenery opens into a wide expanse densely lined with blooming cherry blossom trees, revealing a majestic snow-capped mountain in the distance. The scene then shifts as the blossoms give way to more open village terrain, where an irrigation channel appears alongside scattered farmhouses and a distant wooden bridge. Finally, the path expands into a wider junction with a prominent stone wall on the right, leading the character toward a dense pine forest and the approaching bridge.
